Alice: Nimbus acquired Atlas Labs in 2025.
Bob: I think the merger launched a new platform called Orbit.
Cara: Maybe the timeline is uncertain.

author: analyst
raw_text:
# Briefing
Nimbus works at GlobalAlliance according to one source.
Atlas released an integration update.

author: web_crawler
raw_text:
Nimbus acquired Atlas Labs to expand enterprise AI capabilities.

The company announced Orbit in Berlin during the annual summit.
